nodes.label: Karta 192px Icon - green rounded rect with DE text
nodes.norm_label: karta 192px icon - green rounded rect with de text

nodes.label: SM-2 Style Spaced Repetition Algorithm
nodes.rationale: Uses SM-2 inspired algorithm (ease factor, interval multiplication) with three ratings: again/good/easy. Prioritizes due cards (70%), then reviewed-but-waiting (20%), then new (10%) in buildQueue. Language-namespaced localStorage keys prevent cross-language data mixing.

nodes.label: Offline-First PWA Pattern
nodes.rationale: Cache-first strategy: all core assets cached at install. Service worker caches index.html, all JS, manifest, German JSON vocab files and icons so the app works after first load with no connection required.

nodes.label: localStorage-based Persistence
nodes.rationale: All SRS progress, custom words, bookmarks, voice preferences and streak data stored in localStorage. No backend required. Keys namespaced by language code (srs_v2_{lang}, custom_v1_{lang}, bookmarks_{lang}, preferred_voice_{lang}).
